Our Team

Lincoln's Trusted
Landscaping Professionals

Every project is led by experienced, insured professionals who take pride in their craft. From your first consultation to the final walkthrough — you're in expert hands.

Meet the Professionals

Experienced, Reliable,
Results-Driven

Every team member is trained, insured, and committed to delivering exceptional results on your property — on time, on budget, and beyond expectations.

Founder

Riley Kopf

Founder & Project Director

Riley founded Lucky Landscapes with one mission: deliver professional-grade landscaping with transparent pricing and uncompromising quality. He personally oversees every project from the initial estimate through the final walkthrough, ensuring each detail meets our exacting standards.

Macoy Wollenburg

Operations & Marketing Director

Macoy leads business strategy, digital operations, and client experience — ensuring every touchpoint from your first inquiry to project completion is seamless, professional, and on schedule.

Brodie Chase

Field Operations Manager

Brodie oversees all on-site operations with precision and accountability. He coordinates crew logistics, manages project timelines, and ensures every installation meets our quality benchmarks before sign-off.

Sean Chase

Lead Hardscaping & Installation Specialist

Sean brings expert-level skill in hardscaping, paver installations, retaining walls, and precision landscaping. His meticulous attention to detail and strong work ethic deliver consistently outstanding results for every client.

Our Standards

The Lucky Landscapes
Guarantee

🛡️

Fully Licensed & Insured

Every project is backed by full liability insurance, protecting your property and giving you complete peace of mind from start to finish.

📋

Transparent Communication

No surprises, no hidden costs. We provide detailed written estimates, clear project timelines, and proactive updates at every stage.

🎯

Satisfaction Guaranteed

We don't consider a project complete until you're 100% satisfied. Every job includes a walkthrough to ensure our work exceeds your expectations.

⏱️

On-Time Delivery

We respect your schedule. Our team arrives on time, works efficiently, and delivers completed projects within the agreed-upon timeline.

Ready to Work with Our Team?

Get a free, no-obligation estimate for your project. We typically respond within 24 hours.

Get Your Free Estimate 📞 (402) 405-5475

Careers

Join the Lucky Landscapes Team

We're growing and looking for skilled, motivated professionals who take pride in their work. If you're passionate about landscaping and want to build a career with a company that values quality and integrity, we'd love to hear from you.

View Open Positions
